description.zh: 可擴展的架構應在實作之前就已存在。
description.en: A scalable architecture should exist before implementation.

description.zh: 技術服務商業目標，而非相反。
description.en: Technology serves business goals rather than the opposite.

description.zh: AI 加速實作，但工程判斷力仍是根基。
description.en: AI accelerates implementation, but engineering judgement remains the foundation.

description.zh: 快速交付只有在架構仍可維護時才有意義。
description.en: Fast delivery is meaningful only when the architecture remains maintainable.
